feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Jason Todd (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Dick Grayson/Jason Todd on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Mission: Get Dick Pregnant
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,132Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 23

Summary: Dick gets shot during a mission and a doctors tells Bruce he's had a miscarriage. This is 2 months after the sex pollen thing but Dick didn't know about it.Bruce is feeling guilty for everything that's happened, and when Dick feels better and goes back home, they all have A Very Important Talk.Turns out, after a lot of thinking, Dick wants to try to get pregnant... this time intentionally. And he wants Bruce to reverse his vasectomy!How will this affect their lives? How will their friends and other heroes act when it's known a few intimate details about their whole relationship?

entry.title: Did You Give My Dog Chicken?!
entry.summary:
Author: Wing1940

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,253Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 19

Summary: Richard Grayson pioneered the whole "defying the Big B" thing — first as Nightwing, then as Detective Grayson of the GCPD. Then the Red Hood fell on his head (literally), and now they're stuck playing some damn cat-and-mouse game.

entry.title: Gimme All You Got (I Can Take It)
entry.summary:
Author: Starless_Void

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,878Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 50

Summary: Jason returns to Gotham a year after his showdown with Bruce and the Joker. He hopes to lie under the radar for a bit while he builds up a cleaner reputation for the Red Hood in the Narrows. Dick lost Jason once to the Joker, then a second time to Bruce's morals. When he gets word that Jason has returned to Gotham while Batman and Robin are on a deep space mission, Dick seizes the opportunity to reconnect with his protege, hoping to fix their bond and in the process, fix himself. Losing Bludhaven was a hard blow, and learning that Jason had been so close only to be lost to them again broke something in Dick that he hasn't been able to fix. Can Jason handle finally having someone who will always choose him first, or will he suffocate under Dick's possessive tendencies and need for constant control? Can Dick break through Jason's walls and bring his little wing back into the fold, or will he push too hard and force Jason away for good?

entry.title: like the moon, i must constantly question, who did i kill for this silk?
entry.summary:
Author: skinnedknees (honeysugarchocolate)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,960Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 37

Summary: Dick would be lying if he said he wasn't snagged on those stygian eyes and the arrogance that dripped down those lips. "So if I'm playing along correctly, you're saying this is where I throw my car keys on the table?" "I don't think a car would cut it, frankly," the man returns. He stares at Dick and Dick feels it like energy warbling through his fingers, an aching flow of magma that drools down his skin. It is as indecipherable as it is intense. And that’s when Dick realizes that it must be him. Jason Todd.

entry.title: Glass Rain
entry.summary:
Author: soaring_bubblegum

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 246,297Chapters: 54/54Kudos: 1,962

Summary: Jason Todd wakes up in the wrong Gotham. Here, he stayed dead. Here, his death broke his family so completely they became the monsters they once fought. Dick Grayson haunts the skyline with wings and talons, Barbara Gordon moves like a spider made of shadow, and something that might have once been Batman rules from a corrupted cave. The city is quarantined, the air tastes of ozone and old blood, and Jason should be running. Instead, he finds himself drawn to the creature that was once his brother—the one stalking him through twisted streets with eyes that still burn with something almost human. Some hunts, it turns out, go both ways.

entry.title: Sharing beds like little kids
entry.summary:
Author: arakhnoidsilk

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,739Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 44

Summary: Dick helped. Somehow, his behavior recalled Catherine's. And that alone allowed Jason to ease Dick into his regression periods, letting him hang around, cuddling together. Even when Jason fell into his non-verbal state, Dick took it in stride, never seemingly judging him for it.It had been indeed reassuring, but god knew how much Dick could have taken before he got sick and tired of Jason's way of behaving. So he never let himself go fully, too worried that if he did, Dick would have left him for good.Now that he was in the body of an eight-year-old, however, he found it more than difficult to act twenty-five. He was struggling against himself, trying to keep his adult behaviour on point, but somehow his regression seemed to get the best of him.

entry.title: Common Grounds
entry.summary:
Author: MewSefet

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,548Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 206

Summary: What happens when you accidently start dating your son's English teacher? When Dick and Jason find themselves pushed together on a rainy day in their usual coffee shop, neither of them expect their lives are already intertwined. How casual flirting and mutual interest turns into dating, turns into an identity reveal that neither of them expect, but should have figured out earlier. Eg. the Detective!Dick Grayson/Teacher!Jason Todd fic that no one asked for. Including Jason is Damian's teacher, and Damian is 80% Dick's son and identity shenanigans in a Civillian!AU.

entry.title: no light, no light
entry.summary:
Author: pigeonegg

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,619Chapters: 5/10Kudos: 206

Summary: Jason falls asleep trying not to desperately inhale the faint scent of Dick’s cologne, trying not to play the words honey and sweetheart over and over in his head, trying not to think of Dick, shirtless in the bathroom, rolling his eyes and walking out without saying a word. He tries an awful lot and fails anyway. This is where it starts: the slamming of a bedroom door. Jason is twelve, and Dick hates him.

entry.title: for lovers who hesitate
entry.summary:
Author: aikane

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,941Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 76

Summary: This is not how Jason had expected to spend his holidays. He’d been looking forward to testing out his and Dick’s new kitchen, watching classic movie reruns, and cuddling on the couch. And maybe a bit more, if he’s lucky. He was not expecting to play matchmaker for his Dad and the hunky alien.(No seriously how did he get roped into this?)

entry.title: red at the bone
entry.summary:
Author: badalice

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,041Chapters: 3/9Kudos: 37

Summary: Under the aegis of the Order of St. George, the House of Wayne has silently protected the children of Gotham from the monsters that stalk them for nearly two decades. Its members live dangerous, lonely lives, guardians of a secret that the Order will kill to keep safe. When Dick Grayson's estranged brother Jason Todd resurfaces in small town Kansas, on the trail of one of the most dangerous types of monsters the Order hunts and kills, House Dragon Bruce Wayne sends Dick to assist—and, just maybe, to bring Jason back into the fold. Some wounds, though, run too deep, and some promises lie too broken, and Dick knows all too well the welcome that he'll receive if he goes—but when it comes to Jason, he'll do whatever it takes.

entry.title: You Gotta Take It From Me (I'm Gonna Take It From You)
entry.summary:
Author: Starless_Void

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,388Chapters: 20/20Kudos: 248

Summary: Jason makes his way back to Gotham about a year after his big fight with Bruce. He hunkers down in a new apartment, staying as far under the radar as possible to avoid any contact with the Bats- who would probably throw him in Arkham the first chance they got. If only that were his only problem. On top of staying out of the attention of the most paranoid people on the planet, Jason is trying to find a way to undo a stupid spell that has left him in a rather strange state. Returning to Gotham is probably up there in the stupidest decisions he's ever made, but it's his home too. As long as he lays low, doesn't rebuild his criminal empire, and keeps to himself, there shouldn't be any reason for the Bats to bother him.   Dick Grayson has lost Jason twice now. There won't be a third.

entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,207Chapters: 1/16Kudos: 89

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”

entry.title: haunting visions (hold me in your hands and tell me everything will be okay)
entry.summary:
Author: thearkhamknightmare

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 773Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: "You heard me, Hood," he says, and it flows so effortlessly from Grayson's mouth that it feels rehearsed, but Jason knows better. Jason knows Dick; he knows that Dick doesn't take up the habit of holding back when it came to him. "There isn't anything out there right now that's more important to me than you." And when Dick Grayson--Gotham's Boy Wonder, the Golden Child, and The Primordial Robin--holds him, Jason is sure that everything would be alright. If not now, then eventually. or: The whole 'dying and then being revived from a pit of goo controlled by assassins' thing was really getting to Jason, but Dick was always there to make it better. Inspired by an artwork I saw on Tumblr a while back

entry.title: What It Sounds Like
entry.summary:
Author: UltraCaffeinatedIvy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,621Chapters: 14/15Kudos: 163

Summary: Things are mostly looking up for Jason Todd. He’s finally earned a scholarship to Gotham Academy and has a place that actually feels like home. He knows it's not some kind of cosmic reward for getting through a rough past, living through Catherine's addictions, his dad up and disappearing, or any of the other shit he's had to put up with. You get dealt your hand in life, for better or —more likley— worse, and try to make the best of it. Then Dick Grayson steps in. Or Where Pamela Isley adopts Jason Todd. Enrolls him in Gotham Academy and Jason struggles being a normal teenager, having friends and, of course, falls in love with Dick Grayson in the process. A coming of age story.

entry.title: Three Is Greater Than Two
entry.summary:
Author: parkerwritesfic

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,225Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 26

Summary: Dick didn’t want Tim to get the wrong idea, that his being with Jason meant that Dick and Tim couldn’t also happen. He needed to dispel that notion fast. He needed to show Tim how much he liked him, how much he wanted, needed him.Dick and Jason are secretly fucking. Each of them, in turn, starts seeing Tim, too, who has known all along, and all three end up on a collision course headed towards the bedroom.

entry.title: The Inheritance
entry.summary:
Author: HopelesslyObsessed

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,533Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 126

Summary: They had an agreement that for Jason's sake, she'd keep her distance. But when he dies a few weeks short of his sixteenth birthday, it becomes her biggest regret. So, what if he'd had a crush on her? If only she'd been there, maybe things wouldn't have ended so tragically. She shouldn't have ever set foot in Gotham again, but Bruce was going down a dark path, and they both needed Joker to pay for what he did. The clown remains elusive, and she can't deny that Bruce's violence is rubbing off on her. When they finally catch him, things don't end well for any of them, and she's driven further than Bludhaven in search of herself. It starts as a cover, a cathartic act to help her work through her emotions, but her pain runs deeper, and the only relief she finds is in another young mercenary, who has almost as much as her to hide, and a similar taste in red.

He loved it.
